'''Safonne's Sword''' was the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Safonne Pendon]]'s modest, but effective [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]]. It was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]], which was modified to include six turret-mounted double-[[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser cannons]]. The ship's drive systems and shields were also upgraded by the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] pirate.

{{Ship-stub}}
